title: cotoneaster rugosus var. typicus
intro: Cotoneaster rugosus var. typicus, also known as the Rough-leaved Cotoneaster, is a variety of flowering shrub native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Cotoneaster rugosus var. typicus are thought to include antioxidant, anti-aging, and immune-boosting properties, as well as the potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
